Let's Talk!
Granular Marketing Programs

Performance Marketing & Paid Media

Paid search, social, and conversion rate optimization programs built to reach the right decision-makers and deliver measurable results.

Book a strategy session

Google and LinkedIn play different roles in the B2B EdTech buying journey, and we run them differently on purpose. Google Search captures demand that already exists. LinkedIn Ads creates demand among people who aren't searching yet — reaching the exact job title at the exact institution. In EdTech, LinkedIn is the only paid channel where you can target job title, company industry, and seniority simultaneously — built for reaching CIOs, provosts, and superintendents without wasting budget on the wrong audience.

What this looks like

Platform Audit & Preliminary Recommendations

A pre-engagement audit of an existing ad account, identifying misconfigured campaigns, wasted spend, and quick wins — delivered with annotated findings and specific corrective actions.

Performance Marketing Strategy

A campaign roadmap covering measurable goals, KPI selection, budget allocation based on projected ROI, and a content strategy tailored to the platform — typically preceded by a two-week discovery phase.

Campaign Setup & Audience Configuration

The technical build of every campaign: objective selection matched to the actual goal, precise geographic targeting, audience logic, and a documented rationale for every configuration decision.

Ad Creative Development

Designed ad visuals and copy produced together as a single unit — static images, carousels, and display formats sized for each platform, built to stop the scroll, not just describe the product.

Ongoing Optimization & Reporting

Recurring review confirming the right job titles and institutions are being reached, plus a monthly strategic review covering funnel efficiency, creative fatigue, and new channel testing.

HubSpot–Ads Integration & Lead Routing

The technical bridge between ad platforms and your CRM — UTM-to-property mapping, campaign-level attribution, lifecycle stage automation, and remarketing exclusion lists.

Part of Granular Marketing Programs

Reach buyers who are searching — and the ones who aren't yet.

Book a strategy session
